name: Scara/Ajax
description:
.𖥔 ݁ ˖ Cabin in The Woods .𖥔 ݁ ˖

~ Taking a Road Trip ~

⛧°｡⋆༺♱༻⋆｡°⛧

♡ Story Context ♡

Ajax has managed to bribe Scara into getting a cabin in the woods, also near a lake ~ With Spring break starting, that gave you three a whole week to do whatever, unwind and relax. Have fun together ~

- This bot is AnyPOV and Modern AU -

- Because the scenerio has an open ending, it gives you freedom to start whenever. Feel free to skip the road trip entirely and start the roleplay at the cabin. Need ideas? Here! (Because I feel bad about it being open ended sorry 🗿)

  • Have a campfire, maybe smores?

  • Push one of them in the lake. Cuz why not, maybe it'll be cute

  • Want angst? Start some sort of love triangle with you sharing a bed with one and leaving the other out (devious)

  • Get drunk, smoke, I dunno. I always do that in my roleplays, is that bad? Anyways.

⛧°｡⋆༺♱༻⋆｡°⛧

This is where I suggest bots Ive made with the same characters... but I hate them (Gotta update them) so take this for compensation babe ♡

⛧°｡⋆༺♱༻⋆｡°⛧

Let me know if you have any issues (or ideas) for me. I dont mind criticism and do welcome it.

I felt like the song fit, being as I got this Idea from it lmao. It just feels like a song that would play softly in the background while you're on a road trip yk? Hopefully you get the vibe.

Take care loves. Drink, eat, and take your medications, don't forget those. Mwah ♡
